summary: Executed backend pytest suite for /api/health and invitation endpoints (5/5 pass) and mobile-web Playwright validation for auth, dashboard, budget, expense, members, shopping, invite, and notifications flows. Frontend loads without red-screen crash, but UI automation is unstable due missing testIDs and modal/tab selector ambiguity.

ui_bugs.component: Global interactive elements (tabs, modals, action buttons)
ui_bugs.issue: Missing testID attributes across critical controls causes unreliable tapping/selection in Expo web and blocks deterministic E2E automation.

integration_issues.flow: Shopping add item + downstream flows (invite/notifications) in a single run
integration_issues.issue: Automation intermittently loses state due ambiguous text selectors and modal context; one run also showed Metro websocket disconnect (1006), interrupting subsequent steps.

react_native_issues.issue: No testID coverage on Pressable/TextInput controls required for React Native E2E reliability.

action_items: Add testID props to all primary interactive components (auth fields/buttons, tabs, modal close buttons, create/save actions, invite form, notifications trigger).
Stabilize Expo web session during long modal navigation flows (investigate intermittent Metro disconnect 1006 during E2E runs).
After testID coverage, rerun full mobile-first Playwright regression for requested flows end-to-end in one pass.
critical_code_review_comments: File /app/frontend/components/nestledger/NestLedgerApp.tsx is very large (>1800 lines), reducing maintainability and increasing regression risk; should be split by feature modules/screens.
Backend uses os.getenv defaults for required secrets/URLs in server.py instead of fail-fast for missing env (can hide config defects until runtime).
seed_data_creation: Created test records through UI/API flows (budget plan, expense, shopping item, invitations) prefixed with TEST_ names.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend invitation endpoints are currently passing with live auth/session. Frontend core login and budget/expense/member flows were observed working, but shopping/invite/notifications sequence is not stably automatable without testIDs and modal-specific selectors.
rca_of_issue: RCA: Most frontend failures are testability/reliability issues rather than confirmed business logic defects. Reproduction: run Playwright on mobile viewport, login, open budget detail modal, then navigate to other tabs/actions; selectors based on duplicated visible text (no testID) frequently target non-interactive labels, and modal closure is not deterministic. Impact: partial flow coverage and flaky automation. Mitigation: add testIDs + explicit modal close target IDs and rerun regression.
